## Blog Post Contract Notes

- Public reads return only `Published` posts that are not soft deleted.
- Admin endpoints require the `TenantAdminUp` policy.
- Blog content is stored as markdown in the `content` field.
- Slugs are generated by the backend from `title` and made unique per tenant.
- `DELETE /api/Content/blog-posts/{id}` soft deletes by setting `IsDeleted = true`.
